news.title: 美伊战火延烧，全球油价炸了
美防长遭国会质询伊朗学校空袭事件
news.title0: Questions mount for Hegseth over possible US involvement in strike on Iranian school
news.content: 美国参议院民主党人联名致函防长赫格塞斯，要求就伊朗小学遭袭事件作出解释，该事件据称造成168人死亡，包括约110名儿童。
news.content0: Democrats in the US Senate have written to Defence Secretary Pete Hegseth demanding answers about the strike on a primary school in Iran that Iranian officials say killed 168 people, including about 110 children.
news.author: BBC

news.title: 法国曝百万“幽灵车”丑闻
news.title0: France's ghost car scandal that allowed one million illegal vehicles onto the roads
news.content: 法国审计院报告揭露，约百万辆非法注册的“幽灵车”上路，造成数亿欧元税收和罚款损失，并带来严重安全隐患。
news.content0: A million illegally-registered cars are being driven in France in a fraud scandal that has cost hundreds of millions of euros in lost taxes and fines, according to the state auditor.
news.author: BBC

news.title: 美国消费者起诉好市多索要关税退款
news.title0: Customer sues Costco for tariff refunds
news.content: 美国一名消费者对零售商好市多提起集体诉讼，要求该公司将可能获得的关税退款返还给因关税而支付更高价格的顾客。
news.content0: A Costco customer in the US has taken the retailer to court, demanding that the company use potential tariff refunds to return money to shoppers who paid more due to the levies.
news.author: BBC

news.title: 英王查尔斯对加拿大分离运动表关切
news.title0: King expresses 'concern' over Alberta separatists in meeting with First Nations chiefs
news.content: 英王查尔斯三世在白金汉宫会见原住民酋长时，对加拿大阿尔伯塔省的分离主义运动表达了关切。
news.content0: King Charles has "expressed his concern" over the Alberta separatist movement in a meeting with Indigenous leaders at Buckingham Palace, according to a delegation of First Nations chiefs that travelled to London.
news.author: BBC

news.title: 意大利父母被控隐瞒女儿HIV感染并疏于照料
news.title0: Parents accused of hiding daughter's HIV infection and neglect
news.content: 意大利检方指控一对父母隐瞒女儿HIV感染状况，并在其出生后多年未提供医疗护理，导致女孩严重受伤。
news.content0: Prosecutors in Italy are seeking charges against the parents of a nine-year-old girl alleged to have been infected with HIV and deprived of medical care for years.
news.author: BBC

news.title: 智利建筑师斯米利安·拉迪奇获普利兹克奖
news.title0: Pritzker Prize 2026: Chile’s Smiljan Radić wins ‘Nobel’ of architecture
news.content: 智利建筑师斯米利安·拉迪奇荣获2026年普利兹克建筑奖，其作品以实验性设计著称，包括伦敦的环形展馆。
news.content0: Chilean architect Smiljan Radić, whose often-experimental designs include a doughnut-shaped pavilion in London and a restaurant held up by boulders in Santiago, was named the winner of this year’s Pritzker Prize — an award often dubbed the field’s equivalent to a Nobel Prize — on Thursday.
news.author: CNN

news.title: 美国队险遭世界棒球经典赛历史性淘汰
news.title0: How the World Baseball Classic revealed Team USA’s hubris
news.content: 美国队在世界棒球经典赛中不敌意大利，一度濒临历史性出局，最终因意大利大胜墨西哥才惊险晋级。
news.content0: Team USA avoided a World Baseball Classic disaster on Wednesdaywhen Italy pulverized Mexico,ensuring the Americans advanced to the quarterfinals.
news.author: CNN

news.title: 巴拿马运河因霍尔木兹海峡受阻获益
news.title0: With the Strait of Hormuz choked by war, the Panama Canal reaps the benefits
news.content: 霍尔木兹海峡因战争受阻导致燃料和运费飙升，巴拿马运河因航程更短而迎来更多船只，业务量小幅增长。
news.content0: With fuel and freight prices skyrocketing as war chokes theStrait of Hormuz, the Panama Canal is seeing more business than usual.
news.author: CNN

news.title: 英国母亲囚禁女子为奴25年获刑13年
news.title0: Mother who held woman captive as a slave for 25 years jailed
news.content: 英国一名母亲将一名女子囚禁在家中为奴长达25年，强迫其剃发、做家务并靠残羹剩饭生活，最终被判13年监禁。
news.content0: A mother who held a woman captive as a slave inside her "squalid" home for 25 years has been sentenced to 13 years.
news.author: Sky News
